market_context: Markets under pressure from Trump's Iran war escalation comments. Futures down 1%+ with oil spiking above $105. Tech selling off with Tesla down 4% premarket.

predictions.reasoning: Futures indicate 1%+ decline with geopolitical escalation creating risk-off sentiment. VIX jumping 6% to 26.86 confirms heightened market fear driving broad selling pressure.
Tech-heavy Nasdaq futures showing steepest declines of major indices. Rising Treasury yields from oil-driven inflation concerns pressuring high-multiple tech stocks most severely.
Already down 2.09% in premarket at $373.31 from poor Q1 delivery expectations. Broad tech selloff and risk-off sentiment will likely pressure shares further despite SpaceX IPO buzz.
Energy sector surging with WTI crude above $105 on Iran war escalation fears. Oil companies like Chevron gaining 2.92% while geopolitical risk premium drives energy stocks higher.
